headline: Charles Schwab Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) executives highlighted record first-quarter client growth, strong engagement amid market volatility, and expanding product capabilities—particularly in managed investing, lending, artificial intelligence, and digital assets—during the company’s 2026 Spring Business Update.

headline: NexMetro Expands Access to BTR Investment Platform
summary: PHOENIX, April 21, 2026--National build-to-rent leader NexMetro, has expanded access to its investment platform via iCapital, Fidelity Investments, and Charles Schwab.

headline: BetterInvesting™ Magazine Update on The Charles Schwab Corp. (NYSE: SCHW) and Dollar General Corp. (NYSE: DG)
summary: Charles Schwab Corp.'s recent report has investors wondering if the company's stock is fairly valued. Or is it in the buy range? As such, the Editorial Advisory and Securities Review Committee of BetterInvesting Magazine considers Charles Schwab (NYSE: SCHW) as worthy of further study and has named the company its "Stock to Study" for the June/July 2026 issue for investors' informational and educational use.
